other_observers: Kenna Sue Trickey, Graham Ray, Debra Nord
description: The bird briefly flew to the top of the thick grove of Russian Olives from the grasslands.  It was not actively hunting or displaying any typical flycatcher behavior, nor did it give any calls.  The bird was originally found by Colin Woolley and participants of the Bird Conservancy of the Rockies field trip.  No other birds were seen associating with the flycatcher.
photographer: Photographer: Graham Ray, Kathryn Kay, Kenna Sue Trickey
